title: Blacksheep Mocktail
desc: The host entertains the audience with a string of celebrity impressions of various famous personalities in the Tamil film industry and comedy skits.

title: Lovaangi
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular and romantic songs composed and performed by talented artists is played back-to-back.

title: Spotla Pattu
desc: A musician roams the streets playing popular Tamil song requests from people he meets while talking to them and getting to know them.

title: Devil's Kitchen
desc: The host presents a comprehensive compilation of real-life horror incidents and supernatural stories from across the world.

title: Good Night
desc: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits from Tamil movies are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Raja Songs
desc: A compilation of some of the most popular and melodious songs sung and composed by talented artists is played back-to-back.

title: Songs
desc: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits from the Tamil film industry is played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Iyal Isai Iraivan
desc: A comprehensive compilation of melodious devotional songs performed by talented artists in praise of the Almighty is played in quick succession.

title: Restart With Ilayaraja
desc: The host celebrates the legendary music of Ilayaraja, featuring performances, interviews and behind-the-scenes stories of his timeless classics.
